section.heading: Stakeholder outreach
section.chapeau: In carrying out the activities under section 278h–1 of this title as amended by title III of this Act,11 See References in Text note below. the Director shall—

paragraph.content: solicit input from university researchers, private sector experts, relevant Federal agencies, Federal laboratories, State, Tribal, and local governments, civil society groups, and other relevant stakeholders;
solicit input from experts in relevant fields of social science, technology ethics, and law; and
provide opportunity for public comment on guidelines and best practices developed as part of the Initiative, as appropriate.

note.heading: References in Text
note.p: Section 278h–1 of this title as amended by title III of this Act, referred to in text, probably means section 278h–1 of this title as added by title LIII of Pub. L. 116–283, div. E, Jan. 1, 2021, 134 Stat. 4536.
